creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 164653
SVN patch for games/heretic against svn:ports/head

This port has been marked as BROKEN because of the distfiles being unfetchable. Looking into it further revealed that the source, linuxgames.com, is now dead [1] and will likely not return to its previous incarnation.

I am attaching a patch that removes the BROKEN flag, resets MASTER_SITES to a mirror of the distfiles that I put up, and removes the WWW: entry from pkg-descr. The latter of these three seemed appropriate given that I don't believe the site will be coming back, and I don't personally know of a decent replacement for this.

[1] https://web.archive.org/web/20151027100208/http://www.linuxgames.com/
